name: TestWaitForAnyJoinedEvent
title: TestWaitForAnyJoinedEvent
description: Waits for the current set of "joined events." Each individual of these events can resolve the wait state.
Should none of the events occur before the expiration of the time aTimeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms](Transmission of 0: no timeout controlling)
